summary: Completed testing of C.I. Analytics filters (Pillar, Department, Team) and Ideas List T&E name display. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend UI tests passed - filters work correctly and T&E names display properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoint correctly accepts pillar, department, team query params and filters data
Dashboard stats endpoint also supports pillar, department, team filters
Ideas list correctly displays tech_person_name field after Approver when assigned
Ideas without T&E assignment correctly don't show T&E field
Filter cascading works correctly - Department filter enabled after Pillar selection, Team filter enabled after Department selection
Clear All Filters button works correctly to reset all filters

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all filter and T&E display tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data - 11 ideas with various statuses, some with T&E assigned
context_for_next_testing_agent: C.I. Analytics filters (Pillar, Department, Team) verified working. Ideas List T&E name display verified - shows 'T&E: [name]' after Approver field when tech_person_name is assigned. Date filters continue to work alongside new filters. Filter cascading: Pillar -> Department -> Team works correctly.

ci_analytics_pillar_filter.details: Selecting GBS pillar filters analytics data correctly - shows filtered counts

ci_analytics_department_filter.details: Department filter enabled after pillar selection, shows 4 department options for GBS

ci_analytics_team_filter.details: Team filter enabled after department selection

ci_analytics_date_filters.details: Date filters work alongside pillar/department/team filters

ci_analytics_clear_all_filters.details: Clear All button resets all filters correctly

ideas_list_te_name_display.details: T&E name displays after Approver field when assigned (e.g., 'T&E: John Smith')

ideas_list_no_te_when_not_assigned.details: Ideas without T&E assignment don't show T&E field

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Resend email service configured but in test mode
